title: bachan #0974
definition:
1) to examine, try, prove
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to examine, scrutinise
        1a2) to test, prove, try (of gold, persons, the heart, man of God)
    1b) (Niphal) to be tried, proved
    1c) (Pual) to make a trial
nasbUsage:

    NASB:  to examine, try
